author: KawaiiCapy
title: Looking for artist for LADS style OC couple art
content: Alright, it’s finally happened. I’ve become a ✨LADS✨ girlie. Looking for someone to draw: OC x Caleb (Yandere), Friend OC x Sylus, My friend and I’s OCs. MOP: Gcash/Paypal/Kofi/Vgen Budget: Flexible. Please post examples of couple art, TATs, and prices. Contact via DM or comments.

title: Looking for artist for female furries/scalies
